basics.name: Matías Gabriel Rojas
basics.label: CONICET Doctoral Fellow • BSc in Computer Sciences
basics.summary: Bachelor of science in computer science. {{edad}} years old. Doctoral Fellow at Consejo Nacional de Investigaciónes Científicas y Técnicas (CONICET), Argentina. Member of the Computing and Data Sciences Group at the Interdisciplinary Institute of Basic Sciences (ICB). My research focuses on the design and implementation of computational intelligence algorithms applied to bioinformatics problems.

interests.name: Metaheuristics for Drug Discovery
interests.description: Implementation of metaheuristics applied to drug design for specific molecular targets.

interests.name: Differential Expression Analysis in Cancer
interests.description: Biomarker discovery and differential gene expression analysis in cancer.

interests.name: Artificial Genetic Sample Production
interests.description: Use of generative techniques for producing artificial gene expression samples.

interests.name: Alternative Neural Network Training for Medical Cases
interests.description: Metaheuristics applied to the configuration of weights and biases in neural networks for medical diagnosis support.

interests.name: Multiple Sequence Alignment
interests.description: Design of metaheuristics for the multiple alignment of DNA, RNA, and protein sequences.

interests.name: DNA Fragment Assembly and RNA Structure Design
interests.description: Application of multi and single-objective metaheuristics for DNA fragment assembly and design of RNA molecules that fit specific folding structures.
